boundary_quote: 본 보고의 탐지기 사다리·모든 val-A/val-B 수치의 유효 범위는 CubiCasa SEG-IR 우주 한정이다. E1 실무 도면 전이는 미검증이다.

scope.device_authorization: local RTX 5070 Ti, exclusive serial queue, 8 RTX-hour cap

sealed_band_text_quote.quote: B*(수리분할 0.8315) + 0.05 AUPRC ∧ S-node F1≥0.92 ∧ S-pair F1≥0.80 ∧ style-OOD drop≤0.10 ∧ REL≤0.03 ∧ RES≥0.03

S-node_F1.operational_definition: For each frozen GNN-A seed checkpoint, score every common-handle segment node in the sealed val-A drawings using full-graph inference. A positive truth label is handle membership in truth.wall_handles_flat. Predict positive when sigmoid probability >= 0.5; pool TP/FP/FN over all val-A common-handle nodes, compute F1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall), then use the arithmetic mean of the three seed F1 point estimates as the band statistic.

verbatim_sources.quote: one graph per drawing; segment nodes; frozen typed directed edges
17 -> 64 projection; 2 typed message-passing layers; node binary head
val-A pooled per-handle AUPRC; val-A F1 at threshold 0.5
three seed point estimates plus arithmetic mean and population SD

verbatim_sources.locator: build_datasets lines 1119-1163; point_metrics lines 868-894; metric_summary lines 929-939
verbatim_sources.quote: wall_handles = {str(value) for value in truth["wall_handles_flat"]}; labels = np.asarray([handle in wall_handles for handle in handles], dtype=np.int8); predicted = probability >= THRESHOLD; f1 = 2.0 * precision * recall / (precision + recall); values.mean(); values.std(ddof=0)

S-pair_F1.reason: The authorized sources preserve the threshold text but disclose no candidate-pair universe, pair truth-label rule, pair scorer or probability construction, fixed decision threshold, pooling unit, or three-seed aggregation rule. No pair-level numeric value will be created.

true_style-OOD_drop.reason: The authorized calibration source explicitly limits its available style measurement to IID source-category slices and states that true OOD requires a future preregistration. No held-out-style population/split, reference metric, drop direction, or aggregation rule is sealed here, so no true style-OOD number will be created.

verbatim_sources.quote: per source category and pooled cal-eval AUPRC/F1/drawing count, with pooled-minus-category gaps
This is IID source-category slice measurement of frozen models, not held-out-style retraining OOD; a true OOD arm belongs to a future preregistration.

measurement_protocol.split_boundary: Hash the split manifest as an opaque byte stream for mandatory lineage comparison. For semantics, parse only the frozen val-A/A section with a prefix-bounded reader that stops before the val-B/B section; do not deserialize, enumerate, log, hash separately, or otherwise inspect the val-B drawing list.
measurement_protocol.node_inference: Frozen checkpoint load and full-graph val-A inference only; no training, refit, calibration, threshold search, or alternate metric.
measurement_protocol.blocked_bands: Do not run numeric substitutes for S-pair or true style-OOD. Emit null values and BLOCKED_INPUT evidence rows.

adjudication.per_band: DISCOVERED bands: PASS iff the sealed comparison to the sealed threshold is true, otherwise FAIL. Missing operational definitions: BLOCKED_INPUT.
adjudication.three_band_AND: FAIL if any band is FAIL; otherwise BLOCKED_INPUT if any band is BLOCKED_INPUT; otherwise PASS.
adjudication.unknown_policy: Preserve UNKNOWN/BLOCKED_INPUT; invention and threshold relaxation are forbidden.

budget_charge_definition.value: wall_seconds / 3600 while this exclusive serial-queue cell owns the device
